name: dependency-kafka-sample-producer
description: Sample on how to use Kafka dependency in FunctionGraph

scripts.postpack: rm -f ${npm_package_name}.zip && tarball=$(npm list --depth 0 | sed 's/@/-/g; s/ .*/.tgz/g; 1q;'); tar -tf $tarball | sed 's/^package\///' | zip -@r ${npm_package_name}.zip; rm $tarball
